programmes.show_description: The Poseidon Crew finally start digging legendary ground in search of a multi-million-dollar nugget. Shane and Russell endure the snake-ridden wilderness in Pilbara. S7, Ep13
Alone Man Up Or Bow Out. Trying to survive 21 days completely solo, All-Star survivalist Luke McLaughlin takes on the dangerous wilderness of South Africa. S1, Ep1
Alone Blazed And Confused. Desperate for a kill on the African savanna, All-Star survivalist Ryan Holt risks his safety to get in position. A fire in his shelter causes issues. S1, Ep2
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Wilberger Funeral Home. The team saves parts of the Wilberger Funeral Home in New Hope, Virginia. Key items salvaged include an elevator and barn door hardware. S5, Ep9
Mt. Vernon Greek Revival. The Dawgs save as much as they can from a burnt-down house in Mt. Vernon, Ohio. In the shop, Mike builds a chair from a shopping cart. S5, Ep10
Down & Out. With just four weeks left in the season a chronic back injury knocks Shawn down for the count. Plus, George is in a tight spot with his brother. S6, Ep7
Penny Dreadful. At the mouth of the Penny River, Emily saves Zeke from a generator fire, and Kris strikes a devil's bargain with the last willing claim owner in Nome. S6, Ep8
Neville and Mick's final hunt of the season is set to deliver another monster nugget. And, Scrappers boss, Alex, pays the ultimate price for gambling his life savings. S4, Ep13
The Javan Tiger. Forrest delves into the island of Java in Indonesia, seeking the Javan tiger. It was declared extinct in 2003, but there have been recent reported sightings. S1, Ep7
The Island. The treacherous waters surrounding St Paul Island make off-loading crab a terrifying necessity. And another greenhorn walks off the Seabrooke in a cloud of shame. S7, Ep14
I Smell a Nightmare. As Opilio season winds down, two skippers suffer debilitating injuries and the captain of the Wizard physically assaults an unlikely victim. S7, Ep15
On the Brink. Time's up, and it's a frantic race to find the gold before the freeze sets in. The team is at a crossroads when Adam drops a bomb that divides opinions. S1, Ep6
Captain Kidd's Treasure. Josh travels to the Caribbean to hunt for the legendary treasure of Captain Kidd. The search takes him to the island hideout of the notorious buccaneer. S3, Ep10
Africa's Cursed Lake Of Gold. Josh Gates journeys to the wilds of Namibia to embark on a treacherously deep dive in Lake Otjikoto for a long lost World War I treasure. S3, Ep11
A Golden Opportunity. The Raneys convert an old barn into a commercial fishing kitchen. But when Marty is forced to quarantine, Matt and Misty make a golden discovery. S4, Ep1
The Solar System. Lisa jeopardizes a sale with a bespoke jeweller designer. Rod goes toe to toe with ratters who stole opal and equipment from their mine. S6, Ep12
Light And Shadow. A vicious storm threatens to end the Misfits season early. Plus, Issy attempts a new black-lighting technique to impress Opal Joe. S6, Ep13
Arctic Mega Storm. The season's first storm rocks the fleet as Sig plays cat-and-mouse with towering waves. Keith sees an 800-lb crab pot launch into a deckhand's spine. S13, Ep12
Dead-Stick. Sig's stress takes a toll while Sean tries to dock in a hurricane. Keith is left dead-stick in massive seas and Johnathan rolls the dice by the Russian border. S13, Ep13
Into The Alien Ocean. Jess and Phil's investigation into unidentified objects off Catalina Island's coast heats up after the discovery of an extra-terrestrial underwater base. S2, Ep12
Pyramid Of Legends. Adventurer, Josh Gates, ventures into the ancient Maya city of El Mirador in search of the lost tombs of mysterious ruling dynasty, the Snake Kings. S4, Ep3
A robbery at the Gold Retrievers' camp puts more pressure on Chris and Brad's partnership. Marcus and Linden finally hit a rich patch of nuggets. S7, Ep14
Alone: Hunted And Haunted. Surrounded by lions and hyenas, All-Star survivalist Lacey Jones is isolated, vulnerable and sleep-deprived as she takes on the African bush. S1, Ep3
Alone: Gary Of The Jungle. All-Star survivalist, Gary Golding, takes on the Belize jungle alone. He bonds with a turtle called Timmy, but an infection threatens his challenge. S1, Ep4
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Riverfront House. The guys take on a Victorian house in Wellsville, Ohio. Key items salvaged include harlequin windows, corbels and front porch columns. S5, Ep11
Little Chef Diner. The Dawgs stay in Roanoke to salvage an old diner sign. Back at the shop, the Whiteside family works together to build a clock from road signs. S5, Ep12
Murky Waters. Injured Shawn relies on his crew and the murky Bering Sea to salvage the empire. Toxic fumes threaten more than Zeke and Emily's season, and George has his final dive. S6, Ep9
No Place Like Nome. The Pomrenkes battle land and sea to vie for a new gold-rich mining ground. Meanwhile, Kris has one last chance to prove his captaincy and mining skills. S6, Ep10
The Victoria Diggers are back on the hunt for multi-million-dollar nuggets. Plus, rookie team the Dust Devils run into trouble with a new dry blower. S5, Ep1
The Tasmanian Tiger Down Under. After numerous eyewitness accounts of the Tasmanian tiger in Australia, Forrest heads to the Cape York Peninsula in search of this unique species. S1, Ep8
Mohawks & Madness, Goodness & Gladness. As the season with big pots and big paydays, the Seabrooke captain fights an illness and the Northwestern takes revenge on the Time Bandit. S7, Ep16
The Gamble. The captains are left reeling when their crab quota is slashed. Should they continue fishing the depleted red grounds or risk everything to find elusive blue crabs? S8, Ep1
Lone Gold. Gold miners Boyce and Ben separately head into the bush of British Columbia, seeking the next big pay streak. Completely alone, they race against winter to hit gold. S1, Ep1
The Ark Of The Covenant. Josh Gates heads to Israel and Ethiopia to search for the lost Ark of the Covenant, the sacred relic said to contain the Ten Commandments. S3, Ep12
England's Vanished Crown Jewels. Josh is on a quest to find the legendary lost treasure of King John. He explores the marshlands of England to find the despised king's crown jewels. S3, Ep13
Stuck In The Mud. Misty and Matt find themselves alone on a critical rescue of Alaskan homesteaders ill from dirty water and stuck in a crumbling cabin. S4, Ep2
Honestly Shared. The Misfits discover they're losing precious opal, so they attempt a dangerous night dig with an excavator and ultraviolet blacklights. S6, Ep14
Hard On The Edge. The Bushmen's home-made hoist and bucket fails. The Opal Whisperers, Sofia and Isaac, get trapped at the bottom of their open cut mine in sweltering temperatures. S6, Ep15
450 Mile Storm. Sig, Johnathan and Jake try to escape a second arctic hurricane, but Keith refuses to heed warnings. Stress-induced chest pains threaten the rest of Sig's season. S13, Ep14
Respect Earned. After suffering chest pains, Sig awaits news in the hospital. Wild Bill pilots the Summer Bay whilst handling conflict on deck, and Sean lays down the law with Zack. S13, Ep15
A child is taken critically ill at night, and a climber falls on the moors. Plus, it's a race against time to help a patient in cardiac arrest. S2, Ep9
The crew carry out an emergency roadside anaesthetic. Then, they save a man who's suffered a cardiac arrest and a biker who's crashed at night. S2, Ep10
